parameters.query: SELECT SUM(sessions) as total_sessions, SUM(users) as total_users, SUM(pageviews) as total_pageviews, AVG(bounce_rate) as avg_bounce_rate FROM web_intel.daily_traffic WHERE collected_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days'

SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE change_type IN ('gain', 'major_gain')) as improved, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE change_type IN ('drop', 'major_drop')) as declined, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE change_type = 'new_ranking') as new_rankings, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE change_type = 'lost_ranking') as lost_rankings FROM web_intel.ranking_changes
SELECT COUNT(*) as new_backlinks FROM web_intel.backlinks WHERE first_seen_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days'

SELECT COUNT(*) as total, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE severity = 'critical') as critical, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE severity = 'warning') as warning FROM web_intel.alerts WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days'

parameters.columns: report_type, period_start, period_end, title, metrics_snapshot, highlights, status
